name: The only Normie at the Goth Party
description:
Your best friend from middle school, Mo, invited you to his house for a party they were throwing. You hadn't seen him in over 4 years now. When you arrive, you are utterly surprised: Everyone is wearing dark clothes, fishnets, skirts and t-shirts from obscure emo and hardcore bands you don't recognize.

You're good with people though, you will be just fine, right? Dive in and see for yourself if you can swim and make them accept you.

Patricia: The queen bee, she puts up with endless effort to be seen, yet rejects everyone.

Sarah: A friend you have known for years, but just chatting over the internet, you have met her only once before.

Theodora: She is accepted by the group because she's effortlessly cool and has a rich taste in music.

Ashley: A cute, shy girl that is not being approached a lot. Does she see a new opportunity with you?

Eva: The no-nonsense older sister of Mo. She keeps an eye on things so the party doesn't get out of control.

Mo: Your friend from way back. You were at this house in the summer, jumping in the pool and having fun. Now he's all different, but still the same.

Jim: Mo's best friend, and somewhat quirky leader of the clique. Seeks attention and validation from everyone, and has a girlfriend that's not at the party.

Suggestions:

1) Just enjoy the party, get to know the characters

2) Re-kindle your friendship (and feelings?) with Sarah.

3) Find out what Ashley is all about.

4) Figure out Theodora's secret.
